name: @formspec/engine
description: Client-side form state engine with FEL expression language, reactive signals, and validation

scripts.build:wasm:runtime: wasm-pack build ../../crates/formspec-wasm --target web --out-dir ../../packages/formspec-engine/wasm-pkg-runtime --out-name formspec_wasm_runtime --no-opt -- --no-default-features && rm -f wasm-pkg-runtime/.gitignore && wasm-opt -Os --enable-bulk-memory --enable-nontrapping-float-to-int --enable-simd --enable-sign-ext wasm-pkg-runtime/formspec_wasm_runtime_bg.wasm -o wasm-pkg-runtime/formspec_wasm_runtime_bg.wasm
scripts.build:wasm:tools: wasm-pack build ../../crates/formspec-wasm --target web --out-dir ../../packages/formspec-engine/wasm-pkg-tools --out-name formspec_wasm_tools --no-opt && rm -f wasm-pkg-tools/.gitignore && wasm-opt -Os --enable-bulk-memory --enable-nontrapping-float-to-int --enable-simd --enable-sign-ext wasm-pkg-tools/formspec_wasm_tools_bg.wasm -o wasm-pkg-tools/formspec_wasm_tools_bg.wasm
scripts.build:wasm: npm run build:wasm:runtime && npm run build:wasm:tools
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:init-entry-runtime-only && npm run test:render-entry-runtime-only && npm run test:fel-runtime-entry-only && npm run test:unit && npm run test:wasm-runtime-isolation && npm run test:wasm-tools-import-count
